ui.alliance_details: Joining a faction unlocks specialized reflection classes (e.g. Holy Aegis, Death Herald) dependent on your core Momentum.
ui.chronology_desc: The immutable history of your choices made across the 100 floors of the tower.
ui.chronology_empty: Your Chronology registry is empty. Begin climbing.
ui.ascend_victory_desc: The Tower is fully conquered! You climbed all 100 floors and were crowned Sovereign of the Cosmos. The timeline belongs to your faction.
ui.outer_haven_desc: Beyond the tower gates. Trade items, Rest to replenish HP, or Scout dangers for extra gold.
ui.rest_desc: Restore all HP to full vitality. Costs 50 Gold.
ui.scout_desc: Earn gold tokens by clearing local blight. Risk of taking HP decay.
ui.desc_skirmish: An aggressive threat steps in from the shadows to drain your lifeforce.
ui.desc_chest: A sealed decorative chest humming with celestial or dark currents.
ui.desc_ruins: Eerie runes glow on a cracked pillar.
ui.floor_cleared_desc: You have overcome all challenges on this floor. You are ready to ascend to the next level.
ui.combat_log_enemy_stunned: 🌀 Enemy is stunned and skips turn.
ui.combat_log_player_strike: ⚔️ Light Strike! Dealt %s damage to the enemy.
ui.combat_log_player_heavy_blow: 🔥 Heavy Blow! Dealt %s damage to the enemy. (-15 Aether)
ui.combat_log_player_barrier: 🛡️ Activated Barrier! Recovered +%s HP and gained Shielded status for 2 turns.
ui.combat_log_boss_enraged: 😡 BOSS ENRAGED! HP fell below 50%, attack power increased by 50%!
ui.combat_log_enemy_attack: 👺 Enemy attacked! Dealt %s damage to you.
ui.combat_log_enemy_buff: ✨ Enemy blessed themselves! Attack power increased.
ui.combat_log_victory: 🎉 VICTORY! Enemy defeated. Won +%s EXP, +%s Gold.
ui.combat_log_level_up: ⚡ LEVEL UP! Reached Level %s! Max HP increased.
ui.combat_log_secret_boss_initiated: ⚔️ SECRET THREAT! Engaged in legendary trial with %s! HP: %s
ui.combat_log_boss_attack: 👹 %s retaliates with a crushing blow: -%s DMG!
ui.map_locked_sector_msg: 🔒 Sector Locked! Must complete previous sector first.
ui.settings_theme_desc: How do you want the environment to look? 'Alignment Driven' dynamically chooses between Sanctum and Abyss based on your alignment score.
ui.settings_notif_banner_desc: The floating banner showing recent action logs
ui.settings_notif_title_prefix_desc: Prepends active equipped title before name
ui.quests_titles_desc: Unlock and equip legendary titles by satisfying unique requirements to receive passive Vitality augmentation.
ui.quests_mystery_locked: The conditions are locked in the depths of current era.
ui.quests_floor_objectives_desc: Track active floor targets, narrative events and secret boss objectives loaded from handcrafted blueprints.
ui.quests_empty_cat: No events found in this category.
ui.journal_no_match: No ledger logs match your criteria.
ui.legacy_earn_desc: Earn Legacy Points by resetting your tower climbs.
ui.legacy_quest_defeat_desc: Win 3 combat or boss encounters in the tower.
ui.legacy_quest_pillage_desc: Interact with 2 Chest/Treasure nodes in the tower.
ui.char_backup_desc: Backup your character progress to the Firebase cloud database or restore an existing save.
ui.char_inventory_empty: Your inventory is empty. Complete battles to loot gear.
ui.char_titles_empty: No sovereign titles acquired yet. Make history on higher floors.
ui.sector_cleared_msg: Sector cleared. Select your next destination on the map.
ui.will_recharge_desc: Willpower is required to climb sectors (-1/sector, -2/floor transit) and unlock critical decisions. Watch sponsor videos to earn free willpower, or acquire seasonal passes for infinite willpower!
ui.will_ad_desc: Watch a quick sponsor clip to claim +5 Willpower! (60s cooldown)
ui.will_season_pass_desc: INFINITE WILLPOWER! All climbings, transits and event choices won't cost any Willpower!
ui.billing_desc: Secured Google Play payment service is simulated. Card approval flow initialized.
ui.billing_merchant: Merchant: AI Studio Game Studio s.r.o.
ui.transition_fail_restricted: Direct state transitions restricted to Handcrafted Floors 1-3.
ui.transition_fail_sequential: Sequentially ascend floor by floor. Clear current floor first.
ui.transition_fail_defeat_boss: Defeat the Apex Boss '%s' of Floor %d before ascending.
ui.transition_fail_will: Insufficient Will. Requires %d Will to transcend floor boundaries.
ui.transition_success_journal: Transitioned floors from %d to %d. Will cost: %d. Direction: %s.
ui.msg_climb_will_cost: ❌ Climbing to another floor costs 2 Will. Please rest first.
ui.msg_ascend_victory: Ultimate Sovereign Conquered the Cosmic Tower!
ui.msg_spirit_fracture: 💀 Spirit Fracture triggered! Slipped from Tower back to checkpoint Floor %d.
ui.msg_reset_success: Game restarted. Gained +%d Legacy Points! Upgrades retained.
ui.msg_purchase_adfree_success: Thank you for your purchase! Ad-Free activated.
ui.msg_purchase_pass_success: Sovereign Pass activated! Willpower costs removed.
ui.msg_faction_selected: Swore an oath of allegiance to: %s
ui.msg_faction_renounce: Renounced faction covenants. You are now an Outcast.
ui.msg_daily_reward_claimed: Claimed daily quest reward! +%d Gold, +%d Aether
ui.msg_all_sectors_scouted: All future sectors on this floor are already scouted.
ui.msg_scout_success: Scout Report: Sector %d identified as a [%s].
ui.msg_scout_no_aether: ❌ Insufficient Aether to manifest shadow eye!
ui.msg_scout_success_gold: 🔮 Shadow Eye scouted the void. Revealed +%d Gold cache!
ui.msg_scout_failed_mist: 🔮 Shadow Eye dissolved in the mist. Found nothing useful.
ui.msg_rest_success: 💖 Rested and restored HP by +%d, Willpower by +%d.
ui.floor_2_desc: Bioluminescent crystal clusters illuminate narrow paths covered in glowing dust.
ui.floor_2_intro_desc: You step into a luminous cave. Shards of crystal hum with pure raw energy.
ui.floor_2_intro_optA_journal: Aligned your core with the harmonic light vibrations of the Shimmering Caverns.
ui.floor_2_intro_optB_journal: Harvested shadow-veined void crystals to empower your dark alignment.
ui.floor_2_intro_optC_journal: Mined valuable raw emerald veins to secure additional gold coin reserves.
ui.f2_n0_d: A massive geode hums softly. Ancient knowledge resides within its reflections.
ui.f2_n2_d: An abandoned mining cart containing dusty supply chests.
ui.f2_n4_d: A glowing crystal spire refracting light in absolute harmony.
ui.f2_n6_d: An injured explorer lies by the path, warning of the Crystal Guardian ahead.
ui.f2_n7_d: A merchant offering precious elixirs in exchange for currency.
ui.f2_n9_d: A natural crystal growth filled with nutritious sap.
ui.f2_n11_d: A deep basin where liquid mana bubbles from the earth.
ui.f2_n13_d: The cave walls bounce your footsteps back as strange warning whispers.
ui.f2_n15_d: An ornate vault door left behind by ancient spire builders.
ui.f2_n17_d: A holy site built to align travelers' inner spirits.
ui.f2_boss_d: Clarith, the Shimmering Crystal Guardian, stands tall blocking the passage. Conquered Floor 2 to ascend!
ui.floor_3_desc: Ancient stone corridors filled with dark fog, sarcophagi, and the chill of death.
ui.floor_3_intro_desc: You step past heavy iron gates. The scent of embalming oils and shadow is heavy.
ui.floor_3_intro_optA_journal: Pledged Sanctum resolve against the dark lords of the Shadowed Crypts.
ui.floor_3_intro_optB_journal: Absorbed dark void essence from the tombstones.
ui.floor_3_intro_optC_journal: Looted ancient tomb artifacts to acquire precious gold relics.
ui.f3_n0_d: A cracked sarcophagus emits dark purple fumes. A voice asks for life force.
ui.f3_n2_d: An old storage cabinet once belonging to crypt keepers.
ui.f3_n4_d: A basin of unholy water pulsing with necrotic powers.
ui.f3_n6_d: A dusty library containing forgotten chronicles of the Cosmos.
ui.f3_n7_d: A shady dealer selling forbidden tools.
ui.f3_n9_d: An ornate ceramic urn partially buried under collapsed stone.
ui.f3_n11_d: A tall pillar pulsing with ancient spire healing energies.
ui.f3_n13_d: Two paths lead deeper into the crypts. One is lit by holy candles, the other is dark.
ui.f3_n15_d: The tomb of a cosmic priest, heavily warded with glyph traps.
ui.f3_n17_d: An open dome showing a projection of cosmic stars.
ui.f3_boss_d: Malakar, the Shadow Necromancer Oracle, stands blocking the ascent. Ascend Floor 3 to secure the checkpoint!

lightseeker.name: Zealous Lightseeker ✨
lightseeker.desc: You are driven by the pure, unyielding radiant beam of the Sanctum.

void_reaper.name: Hollow Reaper of Void 💀
void_reaper.desc: The shadows bend to your malicious gaze. A feared collector of corrupt essence.

cosmic_observer.name: Cosmic Balance Arbiter ⚖️
cosmic_observer.desc: A silent watcher holding the scales of creation in perfect alignment.

immortal_phantom.name: Undying Fractured Specter 👻
immortal_phantom.desc: Your soul has fractured many times, yet your core remains stubbornly unbroken.
immortal_phantom.req: Suffer 5+ Spirit Fractures (Deaths) in your journey

spire_conqueror.name: Legendary Spire Pioneer 🏔️
spire_conqueror.desc: You have conquered half of the world's most dangerous tower heights.

gold_hoarder.name: Spire Guild Tycoon 💰
gold_hoarder.desc: Riches beyond imagination. Gold is your ultimate tool of manipulation.

doomsday_bringer.name: Sovereign of Absolute Void 🪐
doomsday_bringer.desc: The embodiment of cosmic decay. You are the doomsday itself.
doomsday_bringer.req: Covenant Aligned with Level 15+ & Momentum 15 or lower

archon_sage.name: Paragon Solar Archon 👑
archon_sage.desc: Pure solar glory radiates from your actions. Spires bow to your presence.
archon_sage.req: Sanctum Aligned with Level 15+ & Momentum 85 or higher

plague_vanquisher.name: Plague Vanquisher 🐀
plague_vanquisher.desc: Slayer of Golgoth, the corrupted Plague Rat King of floor 1.

shard_bearer.name: Shard Bearer 💎
shard_bearer.desc: Slayer of Clarith, the Shimmering Crystal Guardian of floor 2.

crypt_breaker.name: Crypt Breaker ⚰️
crypt_breaker.desc: Slayer of Malakar, the Shadow Necromancer Oracle of floor 3.

floor_1_rat_king.title: Floor 1 Apex: Plague Vanquisher
floor_1_rat_king.desc: Defeat Golgoth, the Plague Rat King who sits bloated upon his pile of garbage.
floor_1_rat_king.req: Conquer Floor 1 Boss and ascend to Floor 2

floor_2_crystal_heart.title: Floor 2 Apex: Shard Unearther
floor_2_crystal_heart.desc: Unearth crystal hearts by defeating Clarith, the Shimmering Crystal Guardian.
floor_2_crystal_heart.req: Conquer Floor 2 Boss and ascend to Floor 3

floor_3_oracle_scourge.title: Floor 3 Apex: Oracle Banisher
floor_3_oracle_scourge.desc: Banish Malakar, the Shadow Necromancer Oracle guarding the deep sub-cathedrals.
floor_3_oracle_scourge.req: Conquer Floor 3 Boss and ascend to Floor 4

main_foothold.title: Tower Foothold
main_foothold.desc: Prove you have the stamina to climb the lower segments of the tower floors.

main_midpoint.title: Aegis Midpoint
main_midpoint.desc: Survive the grueling trial and rise beyond the midpoint of lower floors.

side_wealth.title: Merchant Barter Guild
side_wealth.desc: Earning enough treasure allows you to trade secrets with the high nomads.

side_sanctum_purity.title: Vow of Celestial Purity
side_sanctum_purity.desc: Embrace the solar radiance. Prove your alignment with the divine Sanctum faction.

side_void_alliance.title: Deep Abyss Alliance
side_void_alliance.desc: Whisper to the void, let the dark echo of the Covenant shape your shadows.

chain_ascension_1.title: Initiate's Trial (Chain I)
chain_ascension_1.desc: Every hero begins in shadows. Train your core skills to become an expert crawler.

chain_ascension_2.title: Expert Ascendancy (Chain II)
chain_ascension_2.desc: You have proven your basics. Now steel your soul against deeper corridor horrors.

chain_ascension_3.title: Apex Overlord Decree (Chain III)
chain_ascension_3.desc: The final segment of human limits. Unleash infinite spiritual potential to reach maximum tier.

hidden_fractured_soul.title: ??? (Fractured Resiliency)
hidden_fractured_soul.desc: A secret path revealed only to those whose spirits have shattered repeatedly.

hidden_perfect_balance.title: ??? (True Neutrality)
hidden_perfect_balance.desc: Walk the tightrope of destiny without leaning to heaven or hell up to Floor 15.
hidden_perfect_balance.req: Reach Floor 15 while maintaining EXACTLY 50 Momentum

normal_climb_3.title: The First Steps
normal_climb_3.desc: Every long trek begins with a few courageous steps up the tower base.

special_alignment_pioneer.title: Avenue of Conviction
special_alignment_pioneer.desc: Commit strongly to either the celestial sun rays or the depth of the void.

event_solar_zenith.title: Sovereign Meridian Zenith ☀️
event_solar_zenith.desc: A temporal star solstice has aligned. Unleash your soul's level capabilities.

obelisk_whispers.title: The Singing Chrono-Obelisk
obelisk_whispers.desc: A pulsating obelisk of solid obsidian hums with alien spatial energy. It speaks in branching paths directly to your mind.
obelisk_whispers.req: Character Level >= 2 and Momentum is close to Neutral (30 to 70)

obelisk_opt_light.text: Tune the frequency to the Holy Sunbeams (+15 Momentum, +30 Aether)
obelisk_opt_light.outcome: The obelisk projects a warm blinding beam, purificating your physical aura.

obelisk_opt_void.text: Shatter the crystal to harness pure Void resonance (-15 Momentum, +30 Aether)
obelisk_opt_void.outcome: Sharp dark shards slice your palms, but the flowing chaotic feedback fuels your inner pyre.

obelisk_opt_scholarly.text: Patiently decode the glyphs (+15 Gold, +40 EXP, +1 Will)
obelisk_opt_scholarly.outcome: You decode a spatial shortcut formula, preserving your willpower and gaining valuable ancient wisdom.

shadow_bazaar.title: Smuggler's Underbelly Bazaar
shadow_bazaar.desc: Deep inside structural chambers, a covert smuggler broker offers rare, illegal dimensional bypass seals.

bazaar_opt_buy.outcome: The heavy emblem feels freezing cold, unlocking forbidden deep-sea abyss vision.

bazaar_opt_betray.text: Report him to Sanctum Templars (+20 Momentum, +40 Aether)
bazaar_opt_betray.outcome: Sanctum paladins raid the outpost. The broker retreats but leaves a reward purse behind.

celestial_solstice.title: The Grand Celestial Sun-Altar
celestial_solstice.desc: A holy beacon reflects stellar radiation. A voice demands a symbolic blood pact in exchange for eternal ascension.
celestial_solstice.req: Momentum >= 80 (Celestial leaning development) and Player Level >= 3

sun_opt_blood.text: Drip blood onto solar flames (-20 HP, +120 EXP, +Title)
sun_opt_blood.outcome: Your body burns with divine vigor, forging a sunfire seal on your heart.

sun_opt_meditate.text: Meditate near the heat waves (+10 Momentum, +3 Will)
sun_opt_meditate.outcome: The cosmic heat purges physical toxins and restores mental focus.

abyssal_beast.name: Kharon, Sovereign Shadow Devourer
abyssal_beast.desc: A colossal nightmare bound by raw shadow. He claims souls fractured by excessive tower restarts and dark oaths.
abyssal_beast.req: Momentum <= 10 (Deep Void Affinity) and total Spirit Fractures >= 2

celestial_avatar.name: Uriel, Archon of Radiant Truth
celestial_avatar.desc: The absolute herald of white sunbeams. He descends to challenge the pure ones, examining if combat steel matches structural faith.
celestial_avatar.req: Momentum >= 100 (Absolute Celestial Devotion) and Character Level >= 5

sentinel_relic.name: Arch-Sentinel Chrono-Golem
sentinel_relic.desc: A robotic guardian activated when high amounts of ancient items and wealth resonate with floor coordinates.
sentinel_relic.req: Player Gold >= 250 and carries at least 2 key items

1.title: The Blighted Foothills
1.description: Your climb begins at the root. The atmosphere is damp, thick with blight spores and the skittering of infected creatures.

intro.title: Gateway to Ascendance
intro.description: You stand before the massive iron seal of Floor 1. Cold mist swirls as the wind from the tower corridors whispers secrets.

choice_a.text: Pledge your blade to the Spires (+Aether, +Order)
choice_a.journal: Pledged alignment to the Sanctum at the base gateway.

choice_b.text: Absorb the mold to harden your willpower (+Aether, +Void)
choice_b.journal: Absorbed decay energy to strengthen the dark soul.

choice_c.text: Loot fallen scouts for equipment tokens (+Gold)
choice_c.journal: Prioritized survival equipment tokens over spiritual alignments.

0.title: Entrance Bastion
0.description: Golden light leaks from broken wall cracks. You feel the pulse of the Core.

choice_a.text: Recite a short purification mantra (+10 EXP)
choice_a.journal: Began the climb on Floor 1 with focus and cleansing rituals.

choice_b.text: Smash decorative statues for gold scraps (+20 Gold)
choice_b.journal: Smashed temple icons for quick currency values.

1.title: The Skittering Rat
1.description: A mutant rodent swathed in purple rot blocks the hallway.

2.title: Fallen Soldier's Cache
2.description: An old iron box covered in blight moss.

choice_a.journal: Discovered an Adventurer's Ring in Flatlands cache on Floor 1.

choice_b.text: Pry it open using gold picks (-15 Gold, +Scout Dagger)
choice_b.journal: Acquired a Scout Dagger by picking locks.

3.title: Altar of the Wild Hearth
3.description: Warm warmth emanates from a brick fireplace glowing with holy flame.

choice_a.journal: Healed deep wounds at the Wild Hearth on Floor 1.

choice_b.text: Sacrifice blood to receive power (-10 HP, +15 Aether)
choice_b.journal: Shed blood for the Sanctum's warm light on Floor 1.

4.title: Blight Infested Crawler
4.description: A many-legged insect coated in acid armor waits in the darkness.

5.title: The Whispering Wall
5.description: Eerie runes glow on a cracked pillar. A quiet voice promises power in exchange for your faith.

choice_a.text: Reject the voice and cleanse the stone (+10 Alignment, +20 EXP)
choice_a.journal: Purified a whispering chaotic wall, aligning further with Spires Order.

choice_b.journal: Whispered secrets back to the dark wall, feeding the void soul.

6.title: Shabby Scavenger
6.description: A hunched goblin-like figure with a dynamic trading cart filled with metal scraps.

choice_a.text: Buy Scout Boots (-35 Gold, +Scout Leather Boots)
choice_a.journal: Purchased Scout Leather Boots from the shabby scavenger on Floor 1.

choice_b.journal: Traded junk metal parts for solid coins.

choice_c.journal: Walked past the scavenger merchant without buying.

7.title: Fungal Sporehead
7.description: A parasitic fungus animation driving a dead skeleton forward.

8.title: Blighted Supply Locker
8.description: A locked wooden crate smelling of old pine and sulfur.

choice_a.journal: Forced a crate lock open, getting minor splinter damage but discovering gold.

choice_b.text: Leave it untouched for safety (+10 EXP)
choice_b.journal: Exercised caution by ignoring the suspicious locked crate.

9.title: Shrine of Forgotten Moon
9.description: A moonstone basin filled with glowing dark blue waters.

choice_a.journal: Drank moon water on Floor 1, closing all wounds at small spiritual cost.

choice_b.journal: Sacrificed material wealth to restore enormous raw mental focus and willpower.

10.title: Old Scout's Sanctuary
10.description: A hidden camp under stone roots. A dying scout hands you a secret chain journal.

choice_a.text: Vow to deliver the journal to the Spires (+15 Alignment, +20 EXP, +Old Scout Journal)
choice_a.journal: Vowed to complete the dying scout's chain bequest, starting a hidden questline.

choice_b.text: Take his remaining gold and let him rest (+40 Gold, -15 Alignment)
choice_b.journal: Looted the scout's purse, prioritizing coin values over morality.

11.title: Plague Rat Swarm
11.description: Dozens of tiny red-eyed rodents scurrying and forming an aggressive wall.

12.title: Hidden Grotto Coffer
12.description: An overgrown chest concealed under hanging moss vines.

choice_a.text: Slice vines carefully (-5 HP, +Iron Guard Ring)
choice_a.journal: Slashed thorn vines to reveal an Iron Guard Ring on Floor 1.

choice_b.text: Exchange void core connection code (-10 Aether, +30 Gold)
choice_b.journal: Exchanged shadow essence for direct coin trade.

13.title: Well of Purifying Solace
13.description: A quiet well glowing with restorative white energy.

choice_a.journal: Washed away dark corruption inside the Well of Purifying Solace.

choice_b.journal: Drank toxic residue to boost void pyre power at substantial physical damage.

14.title: SECRET BOSS: Blight Abomination
14.description: An optional giant amalgam of flesh and steel construct lumbering from a side passage! Extreme threat!

15.title: Blight Crypt Alchemist
15.description: A rogue scholar studying mutations offers a secret chain catalyst infusion.

choice_a.text: Inject the experimental catalyst (+15 Aether, +15 Aether, -10 HP)
choice_a.journal: Accepted experimental chemical injection, unlocking deep catalyst potential.

choice_b.journal: Safely bypassed suspicious experimental catalyst injections.

16.title: Wandering Herbologist
16.description: An herbalism druid selling wild roots and healing salves.

choice_a.text: Buy Healing Elixir (-40 Gold, +Deep Cavern Herb Juice)
choice_a.journal: Bought herbal healing juice from wandering druid.

choice_b.journal: Sought coins by selling worthless seeds to druid.

17.title: Rabid Tunnel Hound
17.description: A long-toothed beast glowing with unstable blight fury attacks!

18.title: Totem of Deep Earth
18.description: A heavy stone monolith echoing with ancient earthquakes.

choice_a.text: Vibrate hand on totem (+50 EXP, -12 HP)
choice_a.journal: Touched vibrating earthen monolith, learning deep defensive techniques at minor health loss.

choice_b.text: Offer alignment pledge for willpower (+10 Will, -5 Alignment)
choice_b.journal: Sacrificed minor alignment rigidity to absorb stone willpower.

19.title: Crown of Rat's Nest
19.description: Golgoth, the Plague Rat King, sits bloated upon a pile of garbage and rusted scepters. Complete all 20 sectors to secure ascension!

adventurers_ring.name: Adventurer's Ring
adventurers_ring.description: A simple ring granting extra Will.

acid_spray.name: Acid Spray
acid_spray.description: Sprays acid dealing damage and inflicting Poison

toxic_slam.name: Toxic Slam
toxic_slam.description: Slams down dealing massive damage and Poison

plague_bite.name: Plague Bite
plague_bite.description: Bites with plagued fangs dealing damage and Poison

VITALITY.name: Celestial Vitality
VITALITY.desc: Increase starting HP by +10 per level.

AETHER_FOCUS.name: Aetheric Focus
AETHER_FOCUS.desc: Increase starting Aether by +15 per level.

FORTITUDE.name: Willpower Fortitude
FORTITUDE.desc: Increase maximum Willpower by +1 per level.

GREED.name: Sovereign's Greed
GREED.desc: Increase gold rewards by +20% per level.

RECOVERY.name: Soul Recovery
RECOVERY.desc: Increase HP recovery from Camp and items by +15% per level.
